use_cases: Landing page hero sections where users need to sign up or get a quote through an expandable CTA
Trading and financial platforms requiring quick user onboarding with visual appeal
SaaS product pages with interactive call-to-action flows that minimize friction
ai_summary: A hero section component featuring an expandable button that transforms into a modal form with shader-based visual effects including GodRays background. Supports light/dark mode, includes form submission states (idle/submitting/success), and uses framer-motion for smooth animations. Designed for fintech and SaaS landing pages requiring an engaging, interactive CTA that keeps users on the hero view while capturing leads or signups.
